problem id: 0fe06e8c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11001000 -> 10000011
  11101101 -> 11010011
  01001101 -> 11010001
  11010110 -> 01100011
  11010101 -> 01010011
  01011000 -> 10000001
  01001010 -> 10100001
  00001111 -> 11110000
  11010000 -> 00000011
  00000111 -> 01110000

query: 10111001
predicted answer: 10010010
